style="text;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;overflow=hidden;rounded=0;fontColor=light-dark(#000000,#ABABAB);" value="<h1 style="margin-top: 0px;"><font style="font-size: 16px;">Notes</font></h1><p></p><ul><li>Assumed that Vendor should be modelled as an external B2B partner.</li><li>Payment authorised at Client Portal checkout, prior to order reaching Order Management System.</li><li>Identity strategy is segmented by audience; Entra External ID (B2B) for Vendors, Entra External ID (CIAM) for Clients, Entra ID workforce tenant for internal staff. Chosen in part for free-tier viability at the assumed enterprise scale.</li><li>Payment Gateway is architecturally scoped only; no implementation is included.</li></ul><p></p>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="200" width="410" x="250" y="760" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

ul.li: Assumed that Vendor should be modelled as an external B2B partner.
Payment authorised at Client Portal checkout, prior to order reaching Order Management System.

Identity strategy is segmented by audience; Entra External ID (B2B) for Vendors, Entra External ID (CIAM) for Clients, Entra ID workforce tenant for internal staff. Chosen in part for free-tier viability at the assumed enterprise scale.
Payment Gateway is architecturally scoped only; no implementation is included.
